name: Mercury
philosophy: Startup-bank-for-startups — restrained monochrome canvas, serif-display voltage, tabular-figure mono numerals, warm-muted bronze accent appearing only at brand-mark moments.

design_language.motion_signature: 180ms ease-out hover; signature 400ms scroll-reveal fade on dashboard mockups; tabular-figure crossfades on number transitions, never slot-machine.

trademark_signals: Serif display in fintech — almost no competitor runs serif at hero scale
Tabular-figure mono numerals on every balance/rate/yield
Warm-bone surface for major bands — never pure cream, never pure white
Modest 8px button radius — refuses both square and pill
Mercury Bronze accent only at brand-mark moments, never as button or surface
ai_slop_avoided: Don't use saturated brand colors — restraint is the voltage
